name: Accessibility Labels on Interactive Elements
description: All buttons, images, and interactive elements must have accessibilityLabel for VoiceOver support.
auto_fix_hint: Add .accessibilityLabel("description") to SwiftUI views or set accessibilityLabel in UIKit

name: Loading State for Async Operations
description: Every async operation must show a loading indicator. Users must not be left with a frozen UI.
auto_fix_hint: Use @State var isLoading = false, toggle before/after async call, show ProgressView

name: Error Feedback to User
description: All errors must be presented to the user with an actionable message, not silently swallowed.
auto_fix_hint: Show an alert or error view with a retry action

name: Haptic Feedback for Financial Actions
description: Important financial actions (payment confirmed, transfer sent) should use haptic feedback for physical confirmation.
